: Saved
: Hardware:   ASA5515
!
ASA Version 9.8(4)
!
hostname lab-asa-hygiene
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 nameif inside
 security-level 100
 ip address 10.20.0.1 255.255.255.0
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 no nameif
 no ip address
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 shutdown
 no ip address
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/3
 nameif bvi-member
 security-level 50
 bridge-group 1
!
interface BVI1
 ip address 10.21.0.1 255.255.255.0
!
interface BVI2
 ip address 10.22.0.1 255.255.255.0
!
object network used-host
 host 10.20.0.10
object network dead-host
 host 10.20.0.99
object-group network used-grp
 network-object host 10.20.0.20
object-group network dead-grp
 network-object host 10.20.0.21
time-range EXPIRED-TR
 absolute end 00:00 01 January 2020
time-range ACTIVE-TR
 absolute end 00:00 01 January 2099
access-list HYG_IN extended permit tcp any object used-host eq www
access-list HYG_IN extended permit ip any object-group used-grp
access-list HYG_IN extended permit tcp any host 10.20.0.5 eq 8080 inactive
access-list HYG_IN extended permit tcp any host 10.20.0.6 eq https time-range EXPIRED-TR
access-list HYG_IN extended permit tcp any host 10.20.0.7 eq https time-range ACTIVE-TR
access-list CRYPTO_ACL extended permit ip 10.20.0.0 255.255.255.0 10.30.0.0 255.255.255.0
access-list DEAD_ACL extended permit udp any any eq snmp
access-group HYG_IN in interface inside
crypto map HYGMAP 10 match address CRYPTO_ACL
crypto map HYGMAP interface inside
: end
